title: 7 Herbal Tinctures to Help Pregnant Women with Bleeding Gums
description: Melissa officinalis tinctures are a herbal remedy that may help with bleeding gums. Melissa officinalis, also known as lemon balm, contains properties and constituents such as rosmarinic acid, apigenin, and luteolin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These properties can help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the gums. When taken internally, Melissa officinalis tincture can help to reduce bleeding by improving blood circulation and reducing inflammation ...
